description_long: This is a mid-rise apartment building with a symmetrical facade, featuring five stories and a flat black roof. The exterior is primarily light gray with red accents at the base, balconies, and window sills, giving it a modern yet utilitarian appearance. The front and rear facades are nearly identical, each with two main entrances accessible by short staircases and a central section that slightly protrudes. Rows of evenly spaced windows line each floor, and several balconies are present on the central sections of the front and rear. The side elevations are simpler, with only windows and no balconies or entrances. The building's design suggests reinforced concrete or masonry construction, typical of urban residential blocks.
description: A five-story, modern apartment building with a flat roof, light gray facade, red accents, and symmetrical rows of windows and balconies.
description_view_0: Front view showing two main entrances, central protruding section, and multiple balconies with red accents.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a flat facade with evenly spaced windows and no balconies or entrances.
description_view_2: Rear view nearly identical to the front, with two entrances, central section, and balconies.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with only windows and no balconies or entrances.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in symmetrical vertical and horizontal rows, evenly spaced across all floors, with groupings around the central sections and consistent alignment on each facade.
